^0.8.28;\n\nimport {ERC721} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC721/ERC721.sol\";\nimport {IERC20} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\nimport {SafeERC20} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\nimport {Ownable} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol\";\nimport {Pausable} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Pausable.sol\";\nimport {Strings} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Strings.sol\";\nimport {Base64} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Base64.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @notice Minimal VaultManager interface used by SavingCore to pay maturity interest.\n */\ninterface IVaultManager {\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the receiver for early withdrawal penalties.\n     * @return Address that should receive penalty fees.\n     */\n    function feeReceiver() external view returns (address);\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns whether the vault currently has enough liquidity to pay an interest amount.\n     * @param amount Interest amount to check.\n     * @return canPay Whether the vault balance is at least `amount`.\n     */\n    function canPayInterest(uint256 amount) external view returns (bool canPay);\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Pays interest from the vault to a depositor.\n     * @param to Recipient of the interest payment.\n     * @param amount Amount of interest to pay.\n     */\n    function payInterest(address to, uint256 amount) external;\n}\n\n/**\n * @title SavingCore\n * @notice Base contract for term-deposit plans represented by future ERC721 deposit position NFTs.\n * @dev Deposit and withdrawal logic is intentionally not implemented yet.\n */\ncontract SavingCore is ERC721, Ownable, Pausable {\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n    using Strings for uint256;\n\n    /// @notice Basis-points denominator used for APR and penalty values.\n    uint16 public constant BPS_DENOMINATOR = 10_000;\n\n    /// @notice Number of seconds used for simple-interest APR calculations.\n    uint256 public constant YEAR_SECONDS = 365 days;\n\n    /// @notice Delay after maturity before any caller can trigger auto-renewal.\n    uint256 public constant AUTO_RENEW_GRACE_PERIOD = 3 days;\n\n    /// @notice ERC20 token accepted for term deposits, expected to be USDC or MockUSDC.\n    IERC20 public immutable token;\n\n    /// @notice Vault contract that holds and pays interest liquidity.\n    IVaultManager public immutable vaultManager;\n\n    /// @notice Marketplace contract authorized to transfer active deposit NFTs between accounts.\n    address public depositMarketplace;\n\n    /// @notice Whether token metadata URI updates have been permanently disabled.\n    bool public metadataLocked;\n\n    /// @notice IPFS image URI used in dynamically generated deposit NFT metadata.\n    string public metadataImageURI;\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Lifecycle status for a deposit NFT position.\n     * @dev `None` is the default value for deposits that do not exist yet.\n     */\n    enum DepositStatus {\n        None,\n        Active,\n        Withdrawn,\n        EarlyWithdrawn,\n        ManualRenewed,\n        AutoRenewed\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Configuration for a term-deposit plan.\n     * @param minDeposit Minimum principal amount accepted for this plan.\n     * @param maxDeposit Maximum principal amount accepted for this plan.\n     * @param tenorDays Lock duration in days.\n     * @param aprBps Annual percentage rate in basis points at the plan level.\n     * @param earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps Early withdrawal penalty in basis points.\n     * @param enabled Whether users will be allowed to open new deposits under this plan.\n     */\n    struct SavingPlan {\n        uint256 minDeposit;\n        uint256 maxDeposit;\n        uint64 tenorDays;\n        uint16 aprBps;\n        uint16 earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps;\n        bool enabled;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Stored data for a future deposit NFT position.\n     * @param planId Saving plan selected when the deposit is opened.\n     * @param principal Principal amount deposited by the user.\n     * @param startAt Timestamp when the deposit starts.\n     * @param maturityAt Timestamp when the deposit reaches maturity.\n     * @param aprBpsAtOpen APR snapshot taken when the deposit is opened.\n     * @param penaltyBpsAtOpen Early withdrawal penalty snapshot taken when the deposit is opened.\n     * @param status Current lifecycle status of the deposit.\n     */\n    struct DepositInfo {\n        uint256 planId;\n        uint256 principal;\n        uint64 startAt;\n        uint64 maturityAt;\n        uint16 aprBpsAtOpen;\n        uint16 penaltyBpsAtOpen;\n        DepositStatus status;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Next saving plan id to assign.\n    uint256 public nextPlanId;\n\n    /// @notice Next deposit NFT id to assign when deposit logic is added.\n    uint256 public nextDepositId;\n\n    /// @notice Saving plan configuration by plan id.\n    mapping(uint256 planId => SavingPlan plan) public savingPlans;\n\n    /// @notice Deposit position metadata by future ERC721 token id.\n    mapping(uint256 depositId => DepositInfo info) public deposits;\n\n    /// @notice Unpaid maturity interest by closed deposit id when the vault could not pay immediately.\n    mapping(uint256 depositId => uint256 amount) public unpaidInterest;\n\n    /// @notice Account allowed to claim deferred interest after the deposit NFT is burned.\n    mapping(uint256 depositId => address claimant) public interestClaimant;\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a tenor value is zero.\n    error InvalidTenor();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when APR exceeds the basis-points denominator.\n    error InvalidApr();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when early withdrawal penalty exceeds the basis-points denominator.\n    error InvalidPenalty();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit amount boundary is zero or invalid.\n    error InvalidAmount();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when max deposit is lower than min deposit.\n    error InvalidPlanRange();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a plan id does not exist.\n    error PlanNotFound();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when an operation requires an enabled plan.\n    error PlanNotEnabled();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when enabling an already enabled plan.\n    error PlanAlreadyEnabled();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when disabling an already disabled plan.\n    error PlanAlreadyDisabled();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a constructor address is zero.\n    error InvalidAddress();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit amount is below the selected plan minimum.\n    error AmountBelowMinimum();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit amount is above the selected plan maximum.\n    error AmountAboveMaximum();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit id does not exist.\n    error DepositNotFound();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit is not active.\n    error DepositNotActive();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when caller is not the owner of a deposit NFT.\n    error NotDepositOwner();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit has not reached maturity.\n    error NotMatured();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a maturity timestamp cannot fit in deposit storage.\n    error MaturityOverflow();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when an early withdrawal is attempted after maturity.\n    error AlreadyMatured();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when auto-renewal is attempted before the grace period ends.\n    error GracePeriodNotEnded();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when compounded renewal principal does not fit the target plan limits.\n    error NewPrincipalOutOfRange();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a caller is not the stored deferred-interest claimant.\n    error NotInterestClaimant();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit has no unpaid interest to claim.\n    error NoUnpaidInterest();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a renewal needs interest liquidity that the vault cannot currently pay.\n    error InterestUnavailable();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a deposit NFT transfer is not initiated by the authorized marketplace.\n    error UnauthorizedTransfer();\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when trying to update metadata after it has been permanently locked.\n    error MetadataLocked();\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when a saving plan is created.\n     * @param planId Newly assigned plan id.\n     * @param tenorDays Lock duration in days.\n     * @param aprBps Annual percentage rate in basis points.\n     * @param minDeposit Minimum principal amount accepted for this plan.\n     * @param maxDeposit Maximum principal amount accepted for this plan.\n     * @param earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps Early withdrawal penalty in basis points.\n     * @param enabled Whether the plan starts enabled.\n     */\n    event PlanCreated(\n        uint256 indexed planId,\n        uint64 tenorDays,\n        uint16 aprBps,\n        uint256 minDeposit,\n        uint256 maxDeposit,\n        uint16 earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps,\n        bool enabled\n    );\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when mutable saving plan fields are updated.\n     * @param planId Updated plan id.\n     * @param aprBps Current APR in basis points after the update.\n     * @param enabled Current enabled state after the update.\n     */\n    event PlanUpdated(uint256 indexed planId, uint16 aprBps, bool enabled);\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when a user opens a term deposit.\n     * @param depositId ERC721 token id representing the deposit position.\n     * @param account User that opened and received the deposit NFT.\n     * @param planId Saving plan selected by the user.\n     * @param principal Principal amount transferred into SavingCore.\n     * @param startAt Timestamp when the deposit starts.\n     * @param maturityAt Timestamp when the deposit reaches maturity.\n     * @param aprBpsAtOpen APR snapshot taken when the deposit opened.\n     * @param penaltyBpsAtOpen Early withdrawal penalty snapshot taken when the deposit opened.\n     */\n    event DepositOpened(\n        uint256 indexed depositId,\n        address indexed account,\n        uint256 indexed planId,\n        uint256 principal,\n        uint64 startAt,\n        uint64 maturityAt,\n        uint16 aprBpsAtOpen,\n        uint16 penaltyBpsAtOpen\n    );\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when a deposit is withdrawn.\n     * @param depositId ERC721 token id of the withdrawn deposit position.\n     * @param account User that closed the deposit.\n     * @param principal Original principal amount closed.\n     * @param interest Interest amount paid from VaultManager, if any.\n     * @param penalty Early withdrawal penalty amount, if any.\n     * @param isEarly Whether the withdrawal happened before maturity.\n     */\n    event Withdrawn(\n        uint256 indexed depositId,\n        address indexed account,\n        uint256 principal,\n        uint256 interest,\n        uint256 penalty,\n        bool isEarly\n    );\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when maturity interest could not be paid and was recorded as a later claim.\n     * @param depositId Closed deposit id with deferred interest.\n     * @param claimant Account allowed to claim the deferred interest.\n     * @param amount Interest amount recorded for later payment.\n     */\n    event InterestDeferred(uint256 indexed depositId, address indexed claimant, uint256 amount);\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when deferred maturity interest is claimed from the vault.\n     * @param depositId Closed deposit id whose deferred interest was claimed.\n     * @param claimant Account that received the interest.\n     * @param amount Interest amount paid from VaultManager.\n     */\n    event InterestClaimed(uint256 indexed depositId, address indexed claimant, uint256 amount);\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when an active matured deposit is renewed into a new deposit NFT.\n     * @param oldDepositId Previous deposit NFT id that remains as historical proof.\n     * @param newDepositId Newly minted deposit NFT id.\n     * @param account Owner receiving the renewed deposit NFT.\n     * @param newPlanId Plan id used for the new deposit.\n     * @param oldPrincipal Previous deposit principal before compounding.\n     * @param interest Interest compounded into the new deposit.\n     * @param newPrincipal New principal amount after compounding.\n     * @param startAt Timestamp when the renewed deposit starts.\n     * @param maturityAt Timestamp when the renewed deposit reaches maturity.\n     * @param isAuto Whether renewal was triggered by the permissionless auto-renew path.\n     */\n    event Renewed(\n        uint256 indexed oldDepositId,\n        uint256 indexed newDepositId,\n        address indexed account,\n        uint256 newPlanId,\n        uint256 oldPrincipal,\n        uint256 interest,\n        uint256 newPrincipal,\n        uint64 startAt,\n        uint64 maturityAt,\n        bool isAuto\n    );\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when the authorized deposit marketplace is updated.\n     * @param oldMarketplace Previous marketplace address.\n     * @param newMarketplace New marketplace address.\n     */\n    event DepositMarketplaceUpdated(address indexed oldMarketplace, address indexed newMarketplace);\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Emitted when the metadata image URI is updated.\n     * @param oldImageURI Previous image URI.\n     * @param newImageURI New image URI.\n     */\n    event MetadataImageURIUpdated(string oldImageURI, string newImageURI);\n\n    /// @notice Emitted when token metadata URI updates are permanently disabled.\n    event MetadataPermanentlyLocked();\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Initializes the deposit-position NFT metadata and owner.\n     */\n    constructor(address _token, address _vaultManager) ERC721(\"DeFi Saving Deposit\", \"DSD\") Ownable(msg.sender) {\n        if (_token == address(0) || _vaultManager == address(0)) revert InvalidAddress();\n\n        token = IERC20(_token);\n        vaultManager = IVaultManager(_vaultManager);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Creates a new term-deposit plan.\n     * @param tenorDays Lock duration in days.\n     * @param aprBps Annual percentage rate in basis points.\n     * @param minDeposit Minimum principal amount accepted for this plan.\n     * @param maxDeposit Maximum principal amount accepted for this plan.\n     * @param earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps Early withdrawal penalty in basis points.\n     * @param enabled Whether the plan should accept deposits once deposit logic is added.\n     * @return planId Newly assigned plan id.\n     */\n    function createPlan(\n        uint64 tenorDays,\n        uint16 aprBps,\n        uint256 minDeposit,\n        uint256 maxDeposit,\n        uint16 earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps,\n        bool enabled\n    ) external onlyOwner returns (uint256 planId) {\n        _validatePlanConfig(tenorDays, aprBps, minDeposit, maxDeposit, earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps);\n\n        planId = nextPlanId;\n        unchecked {\n            ++nextPlanId;\n        }\n\n        savingPlans[planId] = SavingPlan({\n            minDeposit: minDeposit,\n            maxDeposit: maxDeposit,\n            tenorDays: tenorDays,\n            aprBps: aprBps,\n            earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps: earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps,\n            enabled: enabled\n        });\n\n        emit PlanCreated(planId, tenorDays, aprBps, minDeposit, maxDeposit, earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps, enabled);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Updates only the APR of an existing saving plan.\n     * @param planId Saving plan id to update.\n     * @param newAprBps New annual percentage rate in devdoc.details: Deposit and withdrawal logic is intentionally not implemented yet.

AlreadyMatured().details: Reverts when an early withdrawal is attempted after maturity.

AmountAboveMaximum().details: Reverts when a deposit amount is above the selected plan maximum.

AmountBelowMinimum().details: Reverts when a deposit amount is below the selected plan minimum.

DepositNotActive().details: Reverts when a deposit is not active.

DepositNotFound().details: Reverts when a deposit id does not exist.

ERC721IncorrectOwner(address,uint256,add.details: Indicates an error related to the ownership over a particular token. Used in transfers.

params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.
params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC721InsufficientApproval(address,uint2.details: Indicates a failure with the `operator`’s approval. Used in transfers.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidApprover(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.

ERC721InvalidOperator(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidOwner(address).details: Indicates that an address can't be an owner. For example, `address(0)` is a forbidden owner in ERC-721. Used in balance queries.

params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.

ERC721InvalidReceiver(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.

params.receiver: Address to which tokens are being transferred.

ERC721InvalidSender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC721NonexistentToken(uint256).details: Indicates a `tokenId` whose `owner` is the zero address.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

GracePeriodNotEnded().details: Reverts when auto-renewal is attempted before the grace period ends.

InterestUnavailable().details: Reverts when a renewal needs interest liquidity that the vault cannot currently pay.

InvalidAddress().details: Reverts when a constructor address is zero.

InvalidAmount().details: Reverts when a deposit amount boundary is zero or invalid.

InvalidApr().details: Reverts when APR exceeds the basis-points denominator.

InvalidPenalty().details: Reverts when early withdrawal penalty exceeds the basis-points denominator.

InvalidPlanRange().details: Reverts when max deposit is lower than min deposit.

InvalidTenor().details: Reverts when a tenor value is zero.

MaturityOverflow().details: Reverts when a maturity timestamp cannot fit in deposit storage.

MetadataLocked().details: Reverts when trying to update metadata after it has been permanently locked.

NewPrincipalOutOfRange().details: Reverts when compounded renewal principal does not fit the target plan limits.

NoUnpaidInterest().details: Reverts when a deposit has no unpaid interest to claim.

NotDepositOwner().details: Reverts when caller is not the owner of a deposit NFT.

NotInterestClaimant().details: Reverts when a caller is not the stored deferred-interest claimant.

NotMatured().details: Reverts when a deposit has not reached maturity.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

PlanAlreadyDisabled().details: Reverts when disabling an already disabled plan.

PlanAlreadyEnabled().details: Reverts when enabling an already enabled plan.

PlanNotEnabled().details: Reverts when an operation requires an enabled plan.

PlanNotFound().details: Reverts when a plan id does not exist.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

UnauthorizedTransfer().details: Reverts when a deposit NFT transfer is not initiated by the authorized marketplace.

Approval(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `owner` enables `approved` to manage the `tokenId` token.

ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool).details: Emitted when `owner` enables or disables (`approved`) `operator` to manage all of its assets.

params.account: User that opened and received the deposit NFT.
params.aprBpsAtOpen: APR snapshot taken when the deposit opened.
params.depositId: ERC721 token id representing the deposit position.
params.maturityAt: Timestamp when the deposit reaches maturity.
params.penaltyBpsAtOpen: Early withdrawal penalty snapshot taken when the deposit opened.
params.planId: Saving plan selected by the user.

params.depositId: Closed deposit id whose deferred interest was claimed.

params.amount: Interest amount recorded for later payment.
params.claimant: Account allowed to claim the deferred interest.
params.depositId: Closed deposit id with deferred interest.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

params.aprBps: Annual percentage rate in basis points.
params.earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps: Early withdrawal penalty in basis points.
params.maxDeposit: Maximum principal amount accepted for this plan.
params.minDeposit: Minimum principal amount accepted for this plan.

params.aprBps: Current APR in basis points after the update.
params.enabled: Current enabled state after the update.

params.account: Owner receiving the renewed deposit NFT.
params.interest: Interest compounded into the new deposit.
params.isAuto: Whether renewal was triggered by the permissionless auto-renew path.
params.maturityAt: Timestamp when the renewed deposit reaches maturity.
params.newPlanId: Plan id used for the new deposit.
params.oldDepositId: Previous deposit NFT id that remains as historical proof.
params.startAt: Timestamp when the renewed deposit starts.

Transfer(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `tokenId` token is transferred from `from` to `to`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

params.depositId: ERC721 token id of the withdrawn deposit position.
params.interest: Interest amount paid from VaultManager, if any.
params.isEarly: Whether the withdrawal happened before maturity.
params.penalty: Early withdrawal penalty amount, if any.

approve(address,uint256).details: Gives permission to `to` to transfer `tokenId` token to another account. The approval is cleared when the token is transferred. Only a single account can be approved at a time, so approving the zero address clears previous approvals. Requirements: - The caller must own the token or be an approved operator. - `tokenId` must exist. Emits an {Approval} event.

autoRenewDeposit(uint256).details: The renewed deposit preserves the original plan id, tenor, APR snapshot, and penalty snapshot.

params.depositId: ERC721 token id representing the matured deposit position.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account.

params.depositId: Closed deposit id with recorded unpaid interest.

params.aprBps: Annual percentage rate in basis points.
params.earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps: Early withdrawal penalty in basis points.
params.enabled: Whether the plan should accept deposits once deposit logic is added.
params.maxDeposit: Maximum principal amount accepted for this plan.
params.minDeposit: Minimum principal amount accepted for this plan.

earlyWithdraw(uint256).details: No interest is paid for early withdrawals. The closed deposit NFT is burned.

params.depositId: ERC721 token id representing the deposit position.

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event.

params.newMarketplace: Marketplace address authorized to execute deposit NFT transfers.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. WARNING: Note that the caller is responsible to confirm that the recipient is capable of receiving ERC-721 or else they may be permanently lost. Usage of {safeTransferFrom} prevents loss, though the caller must understand this adds an external call which potentially creates a reentrancy vulnerability. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. Emits a {Transfer} event.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.newAprBps: New annual percentage rate in basis points.

withdrawAtMaturity(uint256).details: If VaultManager cannot pay the full interest, the unpaid interest is recorded as a later claim.

params.depositId: ERC721 token id representing the deposit position.
